title: A song of ascents. Of David.

verses.1: If the LORD had not been on our side—let Israel now declare—
verses.2: if the LORD had not been on our side when men attacked us,
verses.3: when their anger flared against us, then they would have swallowed us alive,
verses.4: then the floods would have engulfed us, then the torrent would have overwhelmed us,
verses.5: then the raging waters would have swept us away.
verses.6: Blessed be the LORD, who has not given us as prey to their teeth.
verses.7: We have escaped like a bird from the snare of the fowler; the net is torn, and we have slipped away.
verses.8: Our help is in the name of the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
